name: Stacey Forsythe
description:
("Off the Record" Version)

Stacey is the main antagonist from Dead Rising 2:Off the Record. She serves as the head of a zombie rights group called CURE but it is merely a facade as her true identity is that of an agent for the pharmaceutical company Phenotrans that created the zombie suppressing drug "Zombrex". Her mission in Fortune City is to help orchestrate the outbreak there in order to harvest queen bees and monetize the growing demand for more Zombrex. Stacey is a middle aged woman with short brown hair(which she wears extensions fashioned into a ponytail in her disguise)and silver eyes. As an agent for Phenotrans she is fairly decent at hand to hand combat but carries a pistol when she needs to use it.
creator: AnimeMan1993
